cacheserverSpec.description: Configuration for the LMCache cache server deployment

affinity.description: Affinity configuration. If specified, takes precedence over nodeSelectorTerms.

annotations.description: Customized annotations for the cache server deployment

containerPort.description: Port the cache server container is listening on

enabled.description: Whether to enable the cache server

image.description: Image configuration for the cache Server

repository.description: Docker image repository for the cache server

tag.description: Docker image tag for the cache server

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy for the cache server

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private container registries

labels.description: Customized labels for the cache server deployment and service

failureThreshold.description: The number of consecutive failures allowed before considering the probe as failed.

initialDelaySeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait before starting the first probe.

periodSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait between consecutive probes.

timeoutSeconds.description: The number of seconds to wait for a probe response before considering it as failed.

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for the cache server pods

priorityClassName.description: Priority class for the cache server pods

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the cache server pod

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the cache server container

runtimeClassName.description: RuntimeClassName configuration for the cache server pods

schedulerName.description: SchedulerName configuration for the cache server pods

serde.description: Serialization/deserialization format for the cache server

serviceAnnotations.description: Service annotations for the cache server service

servicePort.description: Port the cache server service will listen on

serviceType.description: Kubernetes service type for the cache server

strategy.description: Deployment strategy for the cache server pods

type.description: Customize updateStrategy of the cache server deployment.

tolerations.description: Tolerations configuration for the cache server pods

extraObjects.description: Array of extra Kubernetes objects to deploy. Each object should be a valid Kubernetes manifest in YAML format. This can be used to deploy additional resources such as ConfigMaps, Secrets, or custom resources that are not directly supported by the chart's built-in configuration. Supports use of custom Helm templates.

grafanaDashboards.description: Set to true do deploy dashboards stored in the "dashboards" directory as configmaps. This requires the kube-prometheus-stack to be deployed with Grafana enabled and properly configured to pick up dashboards from configmaps.

annotations.description: Additional annotations to add to the dashboard configmaps

labels.description: Additional labels to add to the dashboard configmaps

kube-prometheus-stack.description: Kube Prometheus Stack dependency chart configuration. More values can be found [here](https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/blob/main/charts/kube-prometheus-stack/values.yaml).

adapterName.description: Name of the adapter to apply

adapterPath.description: Path to the LoRA adapter weights

credentials.description: Reference to secret with storage credentials # Can be either a string that will be stored in a generated secret or an object referencing an existing secret.

secretKey.description: Key in the secret containing the credentials

maxAdapters.description: Maximum number of adapters to load

pattern.description: Pattern to use for the adapter name

repository.description: Repository to get the LoRA adapter from

type.description: Type of adapter source (local, s3, http, huggingface)

baseModel.description: The name of the base model this adapter is for

enabled.description: Whether to create le LoRa adapter

algorithm.description: Placement algorithm to use (default, ordered, equalized)

labels.description: Additional labels for the LoRA adapter

replicas.description: Number of replicas that should load this adapter

vllmApiKey.description: API key configuration for vLLM authentication. If not Set, it defaults to servingEngineSpec.vllmApiKey

secretKey.description: Key in the secret containing the API key

enableLoraController.description: Whether to enable the Lora Controller

extraArgs.description: Extra arguments for the lora controller

annotations.description: Annotations to be added to loraController pdb

enabled.description: Deploy a PodDisruptionBudget for the loraController deployment

labels.description: Labels to be added to loraController pdb

maxUnavailable.description: Number of pods that are unavailable after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%).

minAvailable.description: Number of pods that are available after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%)

enabled.description: Deploy a webhook inside lora controller

prometheus-adapter.description: Prometheus Adapter dependency chart configuration. More values can be found [here](https://github.com/prometheus-community/helm-charts/blob/main/charts/prometheus-adapter/values.yaml).

enableRouter.description: Whether to enable the router service

engineScrapeInterval.description: Interval in seconds to scrape the serving engine metrics

imagePullPolicy.description: image pull policy for the router pod

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private container registries Example: imagePullSecrets: - name: my-registry-secret

annotations.description: Additional annotations for the Ingress resource

className.description: IngressClass that will be used to implement the Ingress

tls.description: The tls configuration for hostnames to be covered with this ingress record.

k8sServiceDiscoveryType.description: Service discovery mode type, supports "pod-ip" or "service-name". Defaults to "pod-ip" if not set.

labels.description: Customized labels for the router deployment

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe configuration for the router pod.

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the liveness probe

lmcacheConfig.description: lmcache configuration for the router deployment

logLevel.description: LMCache log level for the router deployment.

lmcacheControllerPort.description: lmcache controller port, used when routingLogic is "kvaware"

nodePort.description: Fixed NodePort for the router service when serviceType is NodePort.

nodeSelectorTerms.description: The node selector terms to match the nodes. Will be ignored if affinity is configured.

otel.description: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration When otelEndpoint is set, tracing is automatically enabled

secure.description: Use secure (TLS) connection for OTLP exporter (default: false, i.e., insecure)

annotations.description: Annotations to be added to router pdb

enabled.description: Deploy a PodDisruptionBudget for the router deployment

labels.description: Labels to be added to router pdb

maxUnavailable.description: Number of pods that are unavailable after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%).

minAvailable.description: Number of pods that are available after eviction as number or percentage (eg.: 50%)

podAnnotations.description: Customized pod annotations for the router pods

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the readiness probe

repository.description: The docker image of the router. The following values are defaults:

requestStatsWindow.description: Window size in seconds to calculate the request statistics

rootPath.description: FastAPI root path for hosting under a subpath (e.g. /vllm)

route.description: Expose the service via gateway-api HTTPRoute More routes can be added by adding a dictionary key like the 'main' route. Requires Gateway API resources and suitable controller installed within the cluster (see: https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/guides/)

additionalRules.description: Additional custom rules that can be added to the route

annotations.description: Additional annotations to add to the route

apiVersion.description: Set the route apiVersion, e.g. gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1 or gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1alpha2

filters.description: Filters define the filters that are applied to requests that match this rule.

hostnames.description: List of hostnames for the Route

httpsRedirect.description: create http route for redirect (https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/guides/http-redirect-rewrite/#http-to-https-redirects) # Take care that you only enable this on the http listener of the gateway to avoid an infinite redirect. # matches, filters and additionalRules will be ignored if this is set to true.

labels.description: Additional labels to add to the route

parentRefs.description: Gateway API parentRefs for the Route # Must reference an existing Gateway

serviceAnnotations.description: Service annotations if you use a LoadBalancer or NodePort service type

serviceDiscovery.description: Service discovery mode, supports "k8s" or "static". Defaults to "k8s" if not set.

serviceMonitor.description: ServiceMonitor configuration to collect router metrics

enabled.description: Specifies whether to create a ServiceMonitor resource for collecting Prometheus metrics

honorLabels.description: Let prometheus add an exported_ prefix to conflicting labels

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)

relabelings.description: Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)

scrapeTimeout.description: Timeout if metrics can't be retrieved in given time interval

sessionKey.description: session key if using "session" routing logic

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not ready

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the startup probe

staticBackends.description: If serviceDiscovery is set to "static", the comma-separated values below are required. There needs to be the same number of backends and models

tag.description: docker tag for the router pod

vllmApiKey.description: API key for securing the vLLM models. Must be an object referencing an existing secret. If not set, it defaults to .Values.servingEngineSpec.vllmApiKey.

secretKey.description: Key within the secret that contains the vLLM API key

secretName.description: Name of the existing Kubernetes secret that contains the vLLM API key

configs.description: Set other environment variables from config map

enableEngine.description: Whether to enable the serving engine

imagePullPolicy.description: image pull policy for the model deployment

labels.description: Customized labels for the serving engine deployment

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the liveness probe

modelSpec.description: Array of specifications for configuring multiple serving engine deployments running different models. Each entry in the modelSpec array should contain the following fields # The model below serves as an example. It is not deployed by default.

annotations.description: The annotations to add to the deployment

enabled.description: Whether to deploy the model. it Default to true if not set

env.description: The environment variables to set in the container, e.g., your HF_TOKEN

envFromSecret.description: Reference to an existing Kubernetes Secret from which all key/value pairs will be loaded as environment variables into the container

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts to add to the container, in Kubernetes volumeMount format

extraVolumes.description: Additional volumes to add to the pod, in Kubernetes volume format

hf_token.description: Hugging Face token configuration. Can be either a string that will be stored in a generated secret or an object referencing an existing secret.

secretKey.description: Key within the secret that contains the Hugging Face token

secretName.description: Name of the existing Kubernetes secret that contains the Hugging Face token

imagePullSecret.description: Name of secret with credentials to private container repository

initContainer.description: The configuration for the init container to be run before the main container.

args.description: Additional arguments to pass to the command

command.description: The command to run in the init container

env.description: List of environment variables to set in the container

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts to add to the init container, in Kubernetes volumeMount format. https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.32/#volumemount-v1-core

image.description: The Docker image for the init container

mountPvcStorage.description: Whether to mount the model's volume

name.description: The name of the init container

resources.description: The resource requests and limits for the container

keda.description: KEDA autoscaling configuration for this model deployment. Requires KEDA to be installed in the cluster.

name.description: Custom name for the HPA resource

restoreToOriginalReplicaCount.description: Restore original replica count when ScaledObject is deleted

activationTarget.description: Activation target for the composed metric

target.description: Target value for the composed metric

cooldownPeriod.description: How long to wait before scaling down after scaling up (in seconds).

enabled.description: Whether to enable KEDA autoscaling for this model

failureThreshold.description: Number of consecutive failures before fallback

replicas.description: Number of replicas to scale to in fallback

idleReplicaCount.description: Number of replicas to scale to when no triggers are active

initialCooldownPeriod.description: Initial cooldown period in seconds before scaling down after creation

minReplicaCount.description: Minimum number of replicas (supports 0 for scale-to-zero)

pollingInterval.description: How often KEDA should check the metrics (in seconds)

metricName.description: Name of the metric to monitor

query.description: Prometheus query to fetch the metric

limitCPU.description: The CPU limit for the model. If limitCPU and limitMemory are not specified, only GPU resources will have limits set equal to their requests.

limitGPUCores.description: Requires HAMi. The limit of GPU cores. Each unit equals to 1% device cores. https://project-hami.io/docs/userguide/NVIDIA-device/specify-device-core-usage

limitGPUMem.description: Requires HAMi. The limit of GPU memory. Each unit equals to 1M. https://project-hami.io/docs/userguide/NVIDIA-device/specify-device-memory-usage

limitGPUMemPercentage.description: Requires HAMi. The limit of GPU memory of GPU

limitMemory.description: The memory limit for the model. If limitCPU and limitMemory are not specified, only GPU resources will have limits set equal to their requests.

lmcacheConfig.description: The configuration of the LMCache for KV offloading

logLevel.description: The log level for LMCache, e.g., "DEBUG", "INFO", "WARNING", "ERROR"

nodeName.description: Directly assigns a pod to a specific node (e.g., "192.168.56.5"). When both nodeName and nodeSelectorTerms are defined, the preference is given to nodeName.

nodeSelectorTerms.description: The node selector terms to match the nodes. When both affinity and nodeSelectorTerms are defined, nodeSelectorTerms will be ignored.

podAnnotations.description: The annotations to add to the pods

priorityClassName.description: The name of the priority class name for the deployment

pvcAccessMode.description: The access mode policy for the mounted volume.

pvcAnnotations.description: The annotations to add to the PVC

pvcLabels.description: The labels to add to the PVC

pvcMatchLabels.description: The labels to match the PVC.

pvcStorage.description: The amount of storage requested for the model

raySpec.description: RaySec configuration, to deploy the model as a rayCluster instead of a deployment

enabled.description: Whether to deploy the model as a rayCluster

requestCPU.description: CPU request for the head node

requestGPU.description: GPU request for the head node

requestMemory.description: Memory request for the head node

requestCPU.description: The number of CPUs requested for the model

requestGPU.description: The number of GPUs requested for the model

requestGPUCores.description: Requires HAMi. The percentage of GPU cores requested, e.g., "10". Each unit equals to 1% device cores. https://project-hami.io/docs/userguide/NVIDIA-device/specify-device-core-usage

requestGPUMem.description: Requires HAMi. The amount of GPU memory requested. Each unit equals to 1M. https://project-hami.io/docs/userguide/NVIDIA-device/specify-device-memory-usage

requestGPUMemPercentage.description: Requires HAMi. The percentage of GPU memory requested, e.g., "80". It cannot be used together with requestGPUMem.

requestGPUType.description: The type of GPU requested. If not specified, defaults to "nvidia.com/gpu"

requestMemory.description: The amount of memory requested for the model

resources.description: a resources block containing requests and limits. If specified, this takes priority over simplified resource fields

runtimeClassName.description: Runtime class for the pod, e.g., "nvidia". If not specified, falls back to servingEngineSpec.runtimeClassName

serviceAccountName.description: The name of the service account to use for the deployment

shmSize.description: The size of the shared memory

storageClass.description: The storage class of the PVC

tolerations.description: Per-model tolerations. Interacts with servingEngineSpec.tolerations according to tolerationsPolicy.

tolerationsPolicy.description: How per-model tolerations interact with global servingEngineSpec.tolerations.

vllmConfig.description: The configuration for the VLLM model

convert.description: The conversion type for the model, can be "token_embed", "embed", "token_classify", "classify", or "score".

extraArgs.description: Extra command line arguments to pass to vLLM

gpuMemoryUtilization.description: The fraction of GPU memory to be used for the model executor, which can range from 0 to 1

maxLoras.description: The maximum number of LoRA models to be loaded in a single batch

maxNumSeqs.description: Maximum number of sequences to be processed in a single iteration.

runner.description: The runner type for the model, can be auto or pooling

v0.description: Specify to 1 to use vLLM v0, otherwise vLLM v1 is used

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not alive

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before readiness probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the readiness probe

runtimeClassName.description: RuntimeClassName configuration, set to "nvidia" if the model requires GPU

serviceMonitor.description: ServiceMonitor configuration to collect serving engine metrics

enabled.description: Specifies whether to create a ServiceMonitor resource for collecting Prometheus metrics

honorLabels.description: Let prometheus add an exported_ prefix to conflicting labels

metricRelabelings.description: Metric relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Metric Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#metric_relabel_configs)

relabelings.description: Relabel configs to apply to samples before ingestion. [Relabeling](https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/#relabel_config)

scrapeTimeout.description: Timeout if metrics can't be retrieved in given time interval

image.description: Docker image repository and tag for the sidecar

imagePullPolicy.description: image pull policy for the sidecar

failureThreshold.description: Number of times after which if a probe fails in a row, Kubernetes considers that the overall check has failed: the container is not ready

httpGet.description: Configuration of the Kubelet http request on the server

path.description: Path to access on the HTTP server

port.description: Name or number of the port to access on the container, on which the server is listening

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before startup probe is initiated

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the startup probe

tolerations.description: Tolerations configuration (when there are taints on nodes) Example: tolerations: - key: "node-role.kubernetes.io/control-plane" operator: "Exists" effect: "NoSchedule"

vllmApiKey.description: API key for securing the vLLM models. Can be either a string that will be stored in a generated secret or an object referencing an existing secret.

secretKey.description: Key within the secret that contains the vLLM API key

secretName.description: Name of the existing Kubernetes secret that contains the vLLM API key

sharedPvcStorage.description: Configuration for a shared PVC that can be mounted to multiple model deployments.

accessModes.description: Access modes for the shared storage volume

enabled.description: Whether to enable shared storage for the models

hostPath.description: Host path for the shared storage volume. Specifying a hostPath or nfs server will create a PersistentVolume. These fields should be omitted to rely on dynamic provisioning of PersistentVolumeClaim.

image.description: Docker image used in the lora Controller as an init container to set permissions in the PVC

nfs.description: NFS configuration for the shared storage volume

path.description: NFS export path for the shared storage volume

server.description: NFS server address for the shared storage volume

size.description: Size of the shared storage volume

storageClass.description: Storage class name for the shared storage volume
